---
title: "Course Schedule"
---

## Class Meetings

**Lectures:** Monday, Wednesday, Friday 2:00-2:50 PM

**Location:** MacMillan Hall 115

## Assignment Due Dates

| Assignment | Due Date |
|------------|----------|
| Problem Set 1 | February 4, 2026 (11:59 PM) |
| Problem Set 2 | February 11, 2026 (11:59 PM) |
| Problem Set 3 | February 18, 2026 (11:59 PM) |
| Problem Set 4 | February 25, 2026 (11:59 PM) |
| **Midterm 1** | **March 4, 2026 (in class)** |
| Problem Set 5 | March 11, 2026 (11:59 PM) |
| Problem Set 6 | March 18, 2026 (11:59 PM) |
| Problem Set 7 | April 1, 2026 (11:59 PM) |
| Problem Set 8 | April 8, 2026 (11:59 PM) |
| **Midterm 2** | **April 15, 2026 (in class)** |
| Problem Set 9 | April 22, 2026 (11:59 PM) |
| **Final Exam** | **May 12, 2026 (Exam Group 07)** |

## Important Dates

- **Spring Break:** March 21-29, 2026 (No classes)
- **Last Day of Classes:** May 6, 2026
- **Reading Period:** May 7-10, 2026
- **Final Exams:** May 11-19, 2026
